issues.description: Effect uses KO but card text says 'Trash' — KO removes from game, Trash sends to trash pile. Should be ForceDiscard.

Card presents a choice between two effects (Choose one: •Trash OR •Place cards), but DSL only implements the first option. Must represent both branches as separate action paths or clarify single-effect intent.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is non-standard. Should use proper target definition with scope and filter conditions (e.g., character type, cost ≤4).
